title: Patch Notes 0.1.5
description: New Smaller save files: New save files will now be 30MB in average instead of 500MB. Multiple autosaves: The autosave feature will now keep the 3 last versions of each save file, allowing players to go back to a previous version in the Load Game menu. Steam Cloud: Save files can now be synced on Steam Cloud to easily continue playing on a different computer. Lot Changes: Players can now revert ...

title: Paralives x Aloft Bundle Now Available!
description: the adventure doesn’t stop! 🌬️🏡 check out our discounted bundle with @Aloft_game available now on Steam!

title: ☀️ Steam Summer Sale on Now!
description: 🌞 it’s finally warm out and our favourite summertime activity is… playing Paralives! get Paralives at a 20% discount now through July 9th during the Steam Summer Sale! 🌴

title: Paralives Giveaway
description: To celebrate our 1 million copies sold, we’re giving away 10 Steam keys 🗝️🎉 Enter now by participating on Instagram, Facebook, or X/Twitter. Winners will be contacted on June 26th through our official account, make sure your DMs are open!

title: 1,000,000 COPIES SOLD
description: We’re incredibly grateful for all of your support, reviews, and feedback this past month! Thank you a million times ❤️

description: here’s a glimpse into the creation of Paralives’ original soundtrack! it’s out on all streaming platforms, let us know which song is your favorite 😌ྀི♪⋆.✮

title: Patch Notes 0.1.4
description: New Better Steam Workshop tags for mods: Creators can now choose tags for their mods and custom content to help players browse the Steam Workshop more easily. Modders will need to edit their existing mods, households and lots in-game to select new tags. The Unpacking-inspired house from the collab trailer is now available in the lot library menu. Options menu: Added a button to reset each setti...

title: Patch Notes 0.1.3
description: New Paralives x Unpacking collab: Have your Parafolks play Unpacking on the computer, collect Unpacking stamps or elevate rooms with Unpacking plushies and objects! Eat as a group: Each Para will now grab and eat a portion when doing this interaction as a group. Teen romance: Teenagers can now flirt and be in a romantic relationship with other teenagers. title: How to fix corrupted save files
description: In rare cases, your save files might get corrupted because of a bug, or if the game is closed or crashes while saving. We understand that losing a save file is really frustrating, and we are very sorry about that. We are working on improvements to our save system to prevent save files from getting corrupted. In the meantime, if your save file refuses to load, you may attempt to fix it manually ...

title: Patch Notes 0.1.2
description: Bug FixesMade improvements to memory management to eliminate a memory leak and reduce crashes. Fixed a bug where some interface windows could not be closed. Fire: Parafolks now have a chance to autonomously extinguish items on fire instead of always panicking or fleeing. Fire: Stairs can no longer catch on fire because it caused pathfinding issues when trying to extinguish them. Fire: Fixed a b...

title: How to Report a Bug
description: Want to share a suggestion or a bug to help us improve Paralives while in Early Access? Use our handy dandy feedback button!! 🐛
